And this leads us to the next logical step, which is a system I created that will ensure that you leverage all those positive relationships you've fostered into a massive, never-ending stream of customer referrals. The system has six simple steps, so we'll start with number one, which is you need to set a clear target for the number of referrals you want, and then measure your results on a consistent basis. Now, you've all been through the module on prospecting by now, so you understand the power of the sales funnel, and that since sales is basically a numbers game, we need to keep track of our sales funnel by working backwards. In other words, you essentially reverse engineer your referral business the same way you do your sales funnel, by starting from the end, which in this case is how many referrals you want to get each month, and then you essentially work your way to the front, which is how many clients do I actually have to ask for referrals each month to get to that number? Makes sense? In other words, you know all your ratios in the middle, so it allows you to backtrack from, hey, this is how many referrals I want to get each month. I have to ask 10 times that number, because I only get a 10% conversion rate. You get that? If you have any confusion about this, then go back to the prospecting module and review the section on the sales funnel. It's really simple stuff, yet it's really, really effective.
